metadata.title: White House Sochi — Boutique Guest House in Adler
metadata.description: White House boutique guest house in Adler, Sochi. Designer rooms, two heated pools, free airport transfer. 4.9 rating on Yandex Maps. Book: +7 (962) 157-44-97
metadata.keywords: guest house Adler, Sochi hotel, Adler accommodation, White House Sochi, boutique hotel Sochi, book Sochi
metadata.ogTitle: White House Sochi — Premium Boutique Guest House
metadata.ogDescription: Designer rooms, two heated pools, free airport transfer. 4.9 ★ on Yandex Maps.

hero.headline: Белый Дом Сочи
hero.subtitle: White House Sochi
hero.tagline: Your oasis of modern comfort between the sea and the mountains
hero.imageAlt: White House Sochi — modern white villa with pool against the Caucasus mountains and Black Sea at golden hour, architectural photography

paragraphs.p1: White House Sochi is a newly realized designer guest house, born from the desire to create a place where contemporary comfort meets serene elegance. Pure white volumes and flowing lines form spaces filled with light and air.
paragraphs.p2: The philosophy of the house lies in natural harmony. There are no intrusive details — only thoughtful proportions, tactile materials, and a profound sense of calm. Every corner is designed so that guests can fully relax and feel connected to the surrounding world.
paragraphs.p3: Located at the crossroads between Sirius and Krasnaya Polyana — just minutes from the airport and beaches, and half an hour from the mountain peaks. Terraces and windows frame sweeping views of the sea and the Caucasus, while the light architectural lines gently dissolve into the subtropical garden and landscape.

images.main: White House facade with views of the mountains and sea

rooms.heading: Spaces of Light & Form
rooms.subheading: Four distinct residences with flowing terraces and sea views

banner.text: Free transfer included with bookings of 3+ nights

standard.name: Deluxe Terrace
standard.description: Elegant deluxe with its own terrace. Bright white interiors, comfortable lounge area and direct access to fresh air. Perfect for couples who value privacy and connection to nature.

deluxe.name: Pool View Suite
deluxe.description: Spacious suite with full views of the crystal pools. Large windows and balcony create a sense of lightness. Premium finishes make this the ideal place for complete relaxation after a day by the sea or in the mountains.

family.name: Family Luxe
family.description: The perfect family space with two separate bedrooms and a full kitchen. Light, calming interiors focused on comfort and privacy. Plenty of room for everyone to relax together.

apartment.name: Private Villa
apartment.description: Our flagship — an entire private residence. Separate living room, generous kitchen, spectacular terrace. The feeling of your own home with the highest level of seclusion and luxury. The ultimate choice for special moments.

amenities.heading: Spaces of Care and Comfort
amenities.intro: Everything you need for an effortless stay in harmony with nature.

heatedPools.title: Two Heated Pools
heatedPools.desc: Crystal-clear water year-round. Perfect after the sea or mountain walks.

bbq.title: BBQ Area
bbq.desc: Spacious terrace with grill and garden views. Evenings under the open sky.

freeTransfer.title: Complimentary Transfers
freeTransfer.desc: From the airport, train station, and to Sirius beaches when booking 3+ nights.

kitchen.title: Kitchen & Kitchenette
kitchen.desc: Full kitchen or convenient kitchenette for self-catering and independence.

ac.title: Air Conditioning
ac.desc: Individual climate control in every room and apartment.

wifi.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
wifi.desc: Reliable coverage throughout the property for work and leisure.

dailyCleaning.title: Daily Housekeeping
dailyCleaning.desc: Impeccable cleanliness and fresh towels every day.

parking.title: Parking
parking.desc: Free secure parking on the grounds for your vehicle.

excursions.title: Excursions & Adventures
excursions.desc: Organized trips to Abkhazia, Krasnaya Polyana, Sochi and other highlights.

breakfast.title: Signature Breakfasts
breakfast.desc: Delicious home-style breakfasts by Irina featuring local produce.

feature.heading: Two Heated Pools
feature.body: Unwind in the crystal-clear water of our heated pools. Perfect after a day on Rosa Khutor's slopes or a summer afternoon at the beach.
feature.imageAlt: White House heated pools in evening light

location.heading: Perfectly Poised Between Mountains and Sea
location.subheading: The perfect base for mountains and the sea

transfer.heading: Complimentary Transfer
transfer.body: Book 3+ nights and enjoy complimentary transfers to/from the airport, train station, and Sirius beaches.

reviews.ratingMeta: out of 5 · 19 reviews on Yandex Maps
reviews.cta: Read all reviews on Yandex Maps

nina.author: Nina Shtaros
nina.text: We've come back here as a family for the third time! The location is a dream — the airport is just 7 minutes away. Magical heated pools! The house itself is a masterpiece — stunning renovation and crystal cleanliness.

vyacheslav.author: Vyacheslav Artemyev
vyacheslav.text: Beautiful, clean rooms with brand-new renovation. Snow-white fluffy towels and crisp linens. Two heated pools with crystal-clear water. Huge thanks to host Irina for the delicious breakfasts!

lada.author: Lada
lada.text: Rooms in Krasnaya Polyana are pricey, but here you can ski and stroll to the sea. We'll only come back here. The breakfasts are superb!

victoria.author: Victoria L.
victoria.text: Excellent hotel. Clean rooms, great location, delicious breakfasts. Parking available. Very pleasant staff.

discover.heading: Discover the Region
discover.subheading: The best experiences just minutes from White House

sirius-beaches.title: Sirius Beaches
sirius-beaches.desc: Crystal-clear Black Sea waters, pristine beaches and promenades. Perfect for swimming and seaside strolls.

krasnaya-polyana.title: Krasnaya Polyana
krasnaya-polyana.desc: Majestic Caucasus mountains and world-class resorts. Hiking in summer, skiing and snowboarding in winter.

olympic-park.title: Olympic Park
olympic-park.desc: Iconic 2014 Olympic venues, fountains, parks and history. A great spot for photos and leisurely walks.

abkhazia.title: Abkhazia Excursions
abkhazia.desc: Ancient caves, waterfalls, hot springs and fortresses. Fully organized day trips to this magical region.

discover.closing: Every destination tells a new story. We are happy to help plan the perfect day for you.

virtualTour.heading: Virtual 360° Tour & 3D Preview
virtualTour.desc: Walk through the terraces, pools, and luminous interiors from anywhere.
